calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Laliftu Abdela Aliyu appeared via zoom in pro per.

Ms. Aliyu offered her background to the court, that she was born in a small village in Ethiopia, that they don't keep records of birth certificates, and that her mother told her she was born on July 20th.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Deleon. Not reported.
